design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash(title+kind+audience+generated_at) → architecture=workflow-command-center, typography=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, source-card-dossier, implementation-checklist], GSAP=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: hero=Attention, proof/workflows=Interest, media/motion=Desire, CTA band=Action. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk (brand-safe). Hero Math Verification: clamp headline keeps 2–3 lines at max-width 1120px. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded ScrollTrigger + hover physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: all primary CTAs black pill → https://app.getsupers.com/general?login=1&open_login=1.
headline: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

site_brief.audience: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations AI assistant
creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

summary: A premium niche landing page and field guide showing how creators and coaches can use Super’s personal AI agents to turn calls, DMs, and workshops into repeatable content and operational workflows using real computer control and a reusable computer-use cache.
